title: calamagrostis inexpansa subsp. barbulata
intro: Calamagrostis inexpansa subsp. barbulata, also known as Barbulata Grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Barbulata Grass include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
